name: Configure Audio Control and Spell Checking for Listening Exam
description: Create a new SEB exam configuration named 'Music History Listening Exam' in the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, credentials: super-admin / admin) to strictly enforce audio settings for a listening test. The configuration must have 'Allow spell checking' disabled. In the audio settings, enable 'Audio Control', set the 'Volume Level' to 80, and ensure 'Mute Audio' is disabled.
